Comprehensive, Patient-Focused Dental Care in Edmonton

At Groove Dental, we provide comprehensive, patient-centred care with a focus on comfort, quality, and long-term oral health. From routine checkups to advanced procedures, our experienced team is here to help you achieve a confident, healthy smile.
​
We offer a full range of general, cosmetic, and surgical dental services—all under one roof.
BOOK ONLINE
VIEW OUR SERVICES

Looking for a Dentist in Edmonton? Welcome to Groove Dental

Groove Dental is led by Dr. Andrew Schmidt, a dedicated general dentist providing modern, comprehensive dental care in Edmonton. Our clinic offers a full range of services, including general, cosmetic, and surgical dentistry for patients of all ages.

 

We believe in a patient-first approach, delivering dental care that is tailored to your needs, comfort, and long-term oral health.

GET TO KNOW US

We Offer Direct Billing to Most Major Insurance Providers

Enjoy a smoother visit—no paperwork, no waiting. Just bring your insurance card and we’ll handle the rest.

OUR DENTAL SERVICES

Complete Dental Care All Under One Roof

At Groove Dental, we provide a full spectrum of care to help you and your family maintain, restore, and enhance your smiles. From routine checkups to advanced treatments, we’re here for every stage of your dental health.

Preventive Care

Exams, cleanings, fillings, & eary detection

Cosmetic Dentistry

Teeth whitening, veneers, & smile design

Smile Alignment

Invisalign, braces, retainers, bite correction

Dentures

Full & partial dentures for lasting function

BOOK NOW
ALL SERVICES

Why Choose Groove Dental?

At Groove Dental, we’re committed to making your dental experience as easy and stress-free as possible. Whether you're booking your first visit or returning for ongoing care, you can expect:

​

  • Flexible scheduling with evening and Saturday appointments

  • A convenient central Edmonton location

  • Direct billing to most major insurance providers

  • Consistent, personal care at every visit

​

We welcome new patients of all ages and tailor our approach to meet your oral health needs.

​

Groove Dental is independently owned and operated — not part of a corporate dental chain. Dr. Schmidt is the sole owner and dentist at Groove Dental, ensuring every patient receives personal attention and consistent care.

​

Your needs, comfort, and long-term oral health are always our first priority.

​

Groove Dental stands apart through a patient-first philosophy, modern technology, and a calm, spa-like environment designed to make dental visits more comfortable. We believe in clear communication, transparency, and thoughtful treatment planning — not rushed, one-size-fits-all dentistry.

​

Because we do not operate on quotas or production targets, our focus is simple: delivering careful, individualized care and long-term results for our patients.

GIVE US A CALL

NEED URGENT DENTAL CARE? SAME-DAY EMERGENCY APPOINTMENTS AVAILABLE

Meet the Expert

Dr. Andrew Schmidt is the owner and sole dentist at Groove Dental. He takes pride in offering consistent, one-on-one care to every patient—from your first visit to long-term treatment.

 

Known for his calm, compassionate approach, Dr. Schmidt focuses on personalized treatment plans, clear communication, and building relationships rooted in trust and comfort.

MEET DR. SCHMIDT
OUR TEAM
Form Fill

FAQ

Groove Dental is a modern, patient-focused dental clinic dedicated to providing comprehensive oral health care. Our team offers preventive, restorative, and cosmetic dental treatments designed to keep your smile healthy and confident. We combine advanced technology with personalized care to make every visit comfortable and effective.

Groove Dental provides a full range of dental services, including:

  • Preventive cleanings and checkups

  • Dental fillings and crowns

  • Teeth whitening and cosmetic dentistry

  • Root canal therapy

  • Invisalign and orthodontic options

  • Dental implants and tooth replacement solutions

  • Emergency dental care


Whether you need routine maintenance or advanced treatment, our experienced team can help.


Yes! Groove Dental welcomes new patients of all ages. You can schedule an appointment online or by phone, and our team will help you transfer dental records, understand your insurance coverage, and prepare for your first visit.


During your first visit, our team will conduct a full dental examination, take digital X-rays if necessary, and discuss your oral health goals. You’ll receive a personalized care plan tailored to your needs, and our hygienist will perform a thorough cleaning to start your dental journey on the right foot.

Groove Dental accepts most major dental insurance plans. Our front desk team can verify your coverage and help you understand your benefits. For patients without insurance, we also offer flexible payment options and in-house membership plans.

We recommend visiting every six months for a cleaning and checkup to maintain oral health, catch potential issues early, and prevent costly treatments later. Patients with specific conditions (like gum disease) may need more frequent visits.

Groove Dental stands out through its patient-first approach, state-of-the-art technology, and calm, spa-like environment. We focus on transparency, comfort, and long-term results rather than rushed, one-size-fits-all dentistry.

Yes, we provide a variety of cosmetic treatments, including teeth whitening, veneers, Invisalign, and smile makeovers. Our cosmetic dentist Dr Schmidt designs treatments that enhance your natural beauty while protecting your oral health.

We offer same-day emergency appointments for dental pain, broken teeth, lost fillings, or any urgent dental issue. If you experience a dental emergency, contact Groove Dental immediately — we’ll prioritize getting you comfortable and treated as soon as possible.

Groove Dental’s office location, contact number, and booking link are available on our website. You can call, text, or book online at your convenience. We’re proud to serve the local community with flexible hours and easy parking.
